Test Case Description: Test accessing Customer Management page without logging in
Test Case Procedure:
1. Open browser.
2. Navigate directly to /AccountManagement?type=user URL.
Expected Results: The system blocks access and automatically redirects the user to /Login page.
Pre-conditions: The user is not logged into the system.

Test Case Description: Test accessing Customer Management page with Customer role
Test Case Procedure:
1. Login to the system with a Customer account.
2. Enter URL /AccountManagement?type=user in browser address bar.
Expected Results: The system denies access and redirects the user to /home page.
Pre-conditions: The user is logged in with a Customer role account.

Test Case Description: Test accessing Customer Management page with Staff role (Employee / Shipment)
Test Case Procedure:
1. Login to the system with a Staff account.
2. Enter URL /AccountManagement?type=user in browser address bar.
Expected Results: The system denies access and redirects the user to /Dashboard page.
Pre-conditions: The user is logged in with an Employee or Shipment account.

Test Case Description: Test accessing Customer Management page with Admin role
Test Case Procedure:
1. Login to the system with an Admin account.
2. Navigate to Dashboard.
3. Click Account Management -> Select Customer Accounts tab.
Expected Results: Access is granted. Customer Accounts list page is displayed properly with all customer data and management tools.
Pre-conditions: The user is logged in with an Admin role account.

Test Case Description: Test viewing Customer Accounts list
Test Case Procedure:
1. Navigate to Account Management page as Admin.
2. Ensure Customer Accounts tab (type=user) is active.
Expected Results:
The Customer Accounts table is displayed:
- Table columns: #, Customer Name, Email, Role, Status, Action.
- + Create Staff button is hidden.
- Role selection dropdown is disabled/read-only (displays static Customer text).
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test searching customer accounts by valid name
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab.
2. Enter valid name keyword (e.g., 'Nguyen') in search box.
3. Click Search button.
Expected Results: The table updates and displays only customer accounts whose full name contains 'Nguyen'.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test searching customer accounts by valid email
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab.
2. Enter email keyword (e.g., 'gmail.com') in search box.
3. Click Search button.
Expected Results: The table updates and displays only customer accounts whose email address contains 'gmail.com'.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test searching customer accounts with non-existent keyword
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab.
2. Enter a non-existent keyword (e.g., 'xyz99999') in search box.
3. Click Search button.
Expected Results: The table displays an empty state message: 'No matching accounts found.'
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test filtering customer accounts by Active status
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab.
2. Select 'Active' from Status filter dropdown.
3. Form auto-submits.
Expected Results: The table updates to show only customer accounts with ACTIVE status.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test filtering customer accounts by Inactive status
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab.
2. Select 'Inactive' from Status filter dropdown.
3. Form auto-submits.
Expected Results: The table updates to show only customer accounts with INACTIVE status (grey badge).
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test customer accounts list pagination display
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab with > 5 total customer accounts.
2. Inspect pagination control at table footer.
Expected Results:
- Table displays a maximum of 5 customer accounts per page.
- Footer shows pagination bar (e.g., 1 2 3 ... ›).
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account, total customer accounts > 5.

Test Case Description: Test navigating between customer list pages
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click page number '2'.
2. Click next page button (›).
3. Click previous page button (‹).
Expected Results: The list correctly displays customer data corresponding to the selected page number while preserving active search keyword and filter selections.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account, total customer pages > 1.

Test Case Description: Test navigating to out-of-range page number in customer list
Test Case Procedure: 1. Enter URL with invalid page parameter (e.g., page=999).
Expected Results: The system automatically adjusts page number to the last valid page (totalPages) without crashing.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test deactivating a Customer account (ACTIVE -> INACTIVE)
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab.
2. Find an ACTIVE Customer row.
3. Click Deactivate (Ngưng hoạt động) button in Action column.
Expected Results:
- Account status changes to INACTIVE.
- Status badge updates to grey 'Inactive'.
- Action button label changes to 'Activate' (Hoạt động).
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account, target Customer status is ACTIVE.

Test Case Description: Test activating a Customer account (INACTIVE -> ACTIVE)
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Customer Management tab.
2. Find an INACTIVE Customer row.
3. Click Activate (Hoạt động) button in Action column.
Expected Results:
- Account status changes to ACTIVE.
- Status badge updates to green 'Active'.
- Action button label changes to 'Deactivate'.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account, target Customer status is INACTIVE.

Test Case Description: Test verifying Role editing is disabled for Customer accounts
Test Case Procedure: 1. Inspect Role column in Customer Accounts table.
Expected Results: Role column displays static label 'Customer'. No role select dropdown is provided. Backend rejects role modification requests for customer accounts.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test verifying + Create Staff button is hidden in Customer tab
Test Case Procedure: 1. Inspect toolbar of Customer Accounts page (type=user).
Expected Results: The + Create Staff button is hidden from the UI.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test verifying Reset Password button is hidden for Customer accounts
Test Case Procedure: 1. Inspect Action column for Customer rows.
Expected Results: Reset Password button is NOT present in Customer table rows. Backend rejects password reset attempts for Customer accounts.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Customer Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test accessing Staff Management page with Admin role
Test Case Procedure:
1. Login to system with Admin account.
2. Navigate to Dashboard.
3. Click Account Management -> Select Staff Accounts tab (type=staff).
Expected Results: Access is granted. Staff Accounts list page is displayed with + Create Staff button, Role filter, and staff management controls.
Pre-conditions: The user is logged in with an Admin role account.

Test Case Description: Test viewing Staff Accounts list
Test Case Procedure: 1. Navigate to Staff Accounts tab (type=staff).
Expected Results:
The Staff Accounts table is displayed:
- Table displays staff name, email, role, status.
- + Create Staff button is visible.
- Role filter dropdown is visible.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test searching staff accounts by valid name
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Enter valid name keyword (e.g., 'Phuc') in search box.
3. Click Search button.
Expected Results: The table updates and displays only staff accounts whose full name contains 'Phuc'.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test searching staff accounts by valid email
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Enter email domain keyword (e.g., 'probuild.com') in search box.
3. Click Search button.
Expected Results: The table updates and displays only staff accounts whose email address contains 'probuild.com'.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test searching staff accounts with non-existent keyword
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Enter non-existent keyword (e.g., 'xyz99999') in search box.
3. Click Search button.
Expected Results: The table displays an empty state message: 'No matching accounts found.'
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test filtering staff accounts by Role
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Select 'Shipment' from Role filter dropdown.
3. Form auto-submits.
Expected Results: The table updates to show only staff accounts assigned to the Shipment role.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test filtering staff accounts by Status
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Select 'Active' or 'Inactive' from Status filter dropdown.
3. Form auto-submits.
Expected Results: The table updates to show only staff accounts matching selected status.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test combined search and filter criteria for staff
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Enter keyword 'Phuc' in search box.
3. Select Role 'Employee'.
4. Select Status 'Active'.
5. Click Search button.
Expected Results: The table displays only staff accounts matching all three criteria simultaneously (Name/Email contains 'Phuc', Role is Employee, Status is Active).
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test staff accounts list pagination
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Inspect pagination control at table footer.
Expected Results:
- Table displays a maximum of 5 staff accounts per page.
- Footer shows pagination navigation buttons (1 2 3 ... ›).
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test creating a new staff account with valid data
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Click + Create Staff button.
3. Enter valid Full Name: 'Nguyen Van An'.
4. Enter unused Email: 'an.nv@probuild.com'.
5. Select Role: 'Employee'.
6. Click Save button.
Expected Results:
- Staff account is created successfully in DB.
- Initial random 8-char password (with !FIRST! prefix) is sent via SMTP.
- Success banner is displayed.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test leaving required fields blank during staff creation
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click + Create Staff button.
2. Leave Full Name or Email blank.
3. Click Save button.
Expected Results: HTML5 / JS Validator prevents form submission and displays required field prompt.
Pre-conditions: Staff creation modal is open.

Test Case Description: Test entering invalid Full Name during staff creation
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click + Create Staff button.
2. Enter name containing numbers/special chars (e.g., 'An123@').
3. Click Save button.
Expected Results: JS Validator displays error message: 'Full name must be 2-50 characters, no numbers or special characters.'
Pre-conditions: Staff creation modal is open.

Test Case Description: Test entering invalid Email format during staff creation
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click + Create Staff button.
2. Enter invalid email (e.g., 'an.nv@com').
3. Click Save button.
Expected Results: JS Validator displays error message: 'Invalid email format.' and blocks submission.
Pre-conditions: Staff creation modal is open.

Test Case Description: Test entering duplicate Email during staff creation
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click + Create Staff button.
2. Enter an existing system email (e.g., 'admin@probuild.com').
3. Click Save button.
Expected Results: Backend returns error banner: 'This email already exists in the system.' and creation is rejected.
Pre-conditions: Staff creation modal is open.

Test Case Description: Test preventing selection of Admin role for new staff
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click + Create Staff button.
2. Inspect Role select dropdown menu.
Expected Results: The 'Admin' (Quản trị viên) option is absent from role selection dropdown. Backend rejects roleId=1.
Pre-conditions: Staff creation modal is open.

Test Case Description: Test staff creation rollback on SMTP delivery error
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click + Create Staff button.
2. Enter email that fails SMTP server delivery.
3. Click Save button.
Expected Results:
- System displays error: 'Unable to send email to this address. Please check email!'
- Account creation is rolled back (not saved to DB).
Pre-conditions: Staff creation modal is open, SMTP delivery fails.

Test Case Description: Test changing staff role successfully
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Find target staff account row.
3. Select a new role from Role dropdown (e.g., change from Employee to Shipment).
Expected Results: System submits update, role is updated in DB, success message 'Role updated successfully' is displayed.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test preventing change of staff role to ADMIN
Test Case Procedure: 1. Inspect Role dropdown on any staff row.
Expected Results: 'Admin' role option is not listed in dropdown options. Backend rejects any POST request with roleId=1.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test preventing Admin from changing their own role
Test Case Procedure: 1. Find currently logged-in Admin's account row in staff list.
Expected Results: The Role select dropdown is disabled (disabled) for currently logged-in Admin row. Backend rejects request if userId == currentAdmin.userId.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test deactivating a Staff account (ACTIVE -> INACTIVE)
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Find an ACTIVE Staff row (Employee or Shipment).
3. Click Deactivate button in Action column.
Expected Results:
- Account status changes to INACTIVE.
- Status badge updates to grey 'Inactive'.
- Action button label changes to 'Activate'.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account, target Staff status is ACTIVE.

Test Case Description: Test activating a Staff account (INACTIVE -> ACTIVE)
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Find an INACTIVE Staff row.
3. Click Activate button in Action column.
Expected Results:
- Account status changes to ACTIVE.
- Status badge updates to green 'Active'.
- Action button label changes to 'Deactivate'.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account, target Staff status is INACTIVE.

Test Case Description: Test preventing Admin from deactivating their own account
Test Case Procedure: 1. Find currently logged-in Admin row in staff list.
Expected Results: Action column displays 'Cannot lock' note instead of Deactivate button. Backend blocks request with error banner.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test preventing deactivation of other Admin accounts
Test Case Procedure:
1. Find another Admin account row in staff list.
2. Inspect Action column.
Expected Results: Action column displays 'Cannot lock' note. Backend blocks status update if target user role is ADMIN.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account, multiple Admin accounts exist.

Test Case Description: Test resetting staff password successfully
Test Case Procedure:
1. Go to Staff Management tab.
2. Click Reset Password button on a staff row.
3. Click OK in browser confirm popup.
Expected Results:
- Password updated in DB to a new random 8-char string with !FIRST! prefix.
- New password email sent to staff.
- Success message displayed.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test cancelling staff password reset
Test Case Procedure:
1. Click Reset Password button on a staff row.
2. Click Cancel in browser confirm popup.
Expected Results: Confirmation modal closes. No password reset request is sent, and existing staff password remains unchanged.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.

Test Case Description: Test preventing Admin from resetting their own password
Test Case Procedure: 1. Find currently logged-in Admin row in staff list.
Expected Results: Reset Password button is hidden for current Admin account. Backend blocks reset if currentAdmin.userId == targetUserId.
Pre-conditions: Logged in with Admin account on Staff Management tab.
